assertions.title: Local and public webhook POST smoke runs validate async lifecycle under real integrations

steps.action: POST local /webhook with valid x-discovery-secret and payload containing variationKey
steps.observed: Initial payload form returned 400 (intent blank). Retry with contract-correct string intent returned 202 accepted_async with runId run_837a41275db44c98b04cff316dfa55f9 and statusPath /runs/run_837a41275db44c98b04cff316dfa55f9.

steps.action: Capture accepted async lineage and poll local statusPath to terminal
steps.observed: Local polling reached terminal at poll 22 with status=failed; terminal error: dependencies.discoveryMemoryStore.writeExploitOutcome is not a function.

steps.action: POST public relay /webhook similarly and capture result
steps.observed: Public relay returned HTTP 404 with ERR_NGROK_3200 (upstream endpoint offline); no runId/statusPath returned.

steps.action: If public ack succeeds, poll to terminal and compare lifecycle parity
steps.expected: Both local and public flows terminalize for parity comparison
steps.observed: Not possible because public relay did not acknowledge; parity comparison blocked.

evidence.network: POST local /webhook -> 202 accepted_async (after one 400 contract-shape retry); GET local /runs/{runId} -> terminal failed; POST public /webhook -> 404 ERR_NGROK_3200

assertions.issues: Public relay path is unavailable (ERR_NGROK_3200), preventing cross-path lifecycle parity validation. Local run terminalized as failed due to runtime dependency error before successful completion.

frictions.description: A first payload used array-shaped discoveryProfile intent fields and was rejected as blank intent.
frictions.resolution: Retried with contract-correct string intent fields in discoveryProfile (request-payload-retry.json), producing accepted async lineage.

blockers.description: Public relay webhook endpoint is offline and returns ERR_NGROK_3200.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried public POST with same valid payload/secret after successful local ack; 404 offline persisted.

summary: VAL-LOOP-CROSS-005 remains blocked: local /webhook acknowledged async lineage and terminalized (failed terminal with runtime dependency error), while public relay could not acknowledge due to ERR_NGROK_3200, so lifecycle parity could not be validated.
